title: attribution — permissions
description: Two audiences. Tenant plane (sanctum) — admin + marketing + owner see aggregated rollups; individual subjects see only their own profile via `/me/attribution`. Platform plane (platform_admin) — cross-tenant read for support + force-reset for regulator-issued erasure requests. All permissions carry the `attribution.` prefix (or `platform.attribution.` on the platform audience) to align with hierarchy.md §4 audience-boundary rules.

permissions.name: attribution.viewAny
permissions.description: See the tenant's attribution profile list. Scoped: marketing sees aggregated (no PII); admin + owner see full rows.

permissions.name: attribution.view
permissions.description: See one attribution profile. Same scope as viewAny.

permissions.name: attribution.view-own
permissions.description: See own attribution profile via GET /me/attribution. Seeded to every authenticated role — GDPR Art. 15 right of access.

permissions.name: attribution.view-all
permissions.description: See EVERY attribution profile in the tenant (admin drill-down). Distinct from viewAny (which is filterable and marketing-scoped).

permissions.name: attribution.view-confidential
permissions.description: See confidential fields (click IDs, ip_hash, user_agent_hash, device_snapshot). Redacted by default for other roles.

permissions.name: attribution.reset
permissions.description: Invoke the GDPR right-to-erasure reset flow on an attribution profile.

permissions.name: attribution.reset-own
permissions.description: Reset own attribution profile. Seeded to every authenticated role — GDPR Art. 17 right to erasure.

permissions.name: attribution.merge
permissions.description: Manually merge N anonymous profiles into an identified profile. Enterprise-only.

permissions.name: attribution.import
permissions.description: Bulk CSV import from external CRMs. Enterprise-only.

permissions.name: attribution.view-rollup
permissions.description: See the campaign performance rollup dashboards. Aggregated data only — no per-subject PII.

permissions.name: attribution.view-audit-usage
permissions.description: See attribution-module operational reports (consent-suppression audit, count-drift reconciler findings).

permissions.name: attribution.view-consent-suppressions
permissions.description: See the consent-suppression audit report (compliance-team specific — DPO role).

permissions.name: platform.attribution.force-reset
permissions.description: Support intervention to reset an attribution bypassing every tenant-level guard. Regulator-issued erasure requests. Every fire is audit-critical + notifies the tenant admin.

permissions.name: platform.attribution.view-audit-usage
permissions.description: Cross-tenant attribution operational report for capacity planning + compliance-team review.
